description_long: This handbag features a tall, tapered bucket shape with a structured body and a single, sturdy handle attached at the top. The exterior is crafted from a woven-texture material in a soft blush pink, accented by a large, intricate floral lace applique in deep burgundy and touches of blue and green embroidery on the front. A small, rectangular metallic brand logo is affixed near the top center of the front panel. The bag closes with a central tab and button mechanism, and a decorative tag hangs from one side. The back and sides are plain, showcasing the woven pattern without additional embellishments. The overall design is elegant and feminine, suitable for urban outings or casual events.
description: A blush pink, woven-texture handbag with a floral lace applique, metallic logo, and a single top handle. Features a central tab closure and decorative side tag.
description_view_0: Side view showing the triangular profile, visible handle attachment, and decorative tag hanging from the top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the floral lace applique, metallic brand logo, and central tab closure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the same triangular profile, handle attachment, and less visible decorative tag.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain woven pattern without any decorative elements or logo.
attribute_brand_logo: Rectangular metallic logo plate on the upper front center, with engraved text.
attribute_strap_type: Single fixed-length top handle, medium length, attached with metal hardware on both sides.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Central tab and button closure at the top center of the bag.
attribute_decorative_elements: Large burgundy floral lace applique with blue and green embroidery on the front, metallic logo plate, decorative hanging tag.
attribute_pattern: Woven texture with large floral lace applique and embroidery on the front.
